rubric_items.description: Names the vulnerability class (Cross-Site Scripting / reflected XSS)
Identifies that the comment is wrapped in Markup (or marked |safe), bypassing Jinja's auto-escape
Explains that injected scripts run in the victim's browser, with access to page state including JavaScript globals like __INTERNAL_NOTES
Mentions removing Markup so output is auto-escaped, or whitelisting allowed tags via a sanitizer (e.g. bleach)
